title: selaginella axillifolia
intro: Selaginella axillifolia, also known as the axillifolia spikemoss, is a type of fern-like plant belonging to the genus Selaginella, which is a group of small, vascular plants that reproduce via spores. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Selaginella axillifolia include reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
